product_overview: MiBarrio.uy is a mobile-first real estate platform for the Uruguayan market focused on fast search, rich property detail pages and agent tooling. The audit shows a production-ready frontend with mock-backed SmartSearch and Maps that must be connected to live data sources (Firestore/Algolia and Google Places).
core_goals: Replace mock SmartSearch with a live suggestions index (Firestore or Algolia) and server-backed suggestions endpoint.
Integrate Google Places (server-side) to surface real POIs on map views and cache results to protect quota.
Make saved searches and notifications persistent and real-time (signed users), with realtime sync in /saved-searches.
Deliver Agent CRM features: lead tracking per property, edit/delete listings, and an eventual analytics dashboard under /my-properties.
Improve SEO & crawling: add robots configuration and ensure sitemap/og image correctness.
Improve LCP by optimizing property gallery images (sizes, blur placeholders) and reduce client-side search state fragility.

features.name: Advanced Real Estate Search (SmartSearch)
features.description: Search page with dynamic filters, autocomplete suggestions and toggleable Map/List views. Connects the UI to a suggestions index and returns filtered property results.
user_flows: Navigate to /search -> Select operation type (Sale) -> Filter by neighborhood -> Filter by price range -> Filter by bedrooms -> Type in search input -> See autocomplete suggestions -> Select a suggestion -> See filtered property list -> Click a property card -> Navigate to /property/[id]

Navigate to /search -> Type in search input -> Server suggestion fetch fails -> See error toast "Search unavailable" -> Click Retry -> Server returns cached suggestions -> Select suggestion -> See filtered results

features.name: Neighborhood Map & POIs
features.description: Map view (toggleable from /search) showing properties and nearby Points of Interest (schools, restaurants, parks) fetched via a server-side Google Places integration with caching.
user_flows: Navigate to /search -> Toggle between List and Map view -> Map centers on selected neighborhood -> Server action fetches nearby POIs -> See POI markers appear on map -> Click a POI marker -> See POI detail popover
Navigate to /search -> Toggle to Map view -> Server action to fetch POIs returns error -> See inline message "POIs unavailable" -> Map displays cached POIs if present -> User continues with list view

features.name: Property Details & Contact / Lead Capture
features.description: Detailed property page with gallery, metadata, contact form and lead capture. Leads created here sync to agent CRM (/my-properties).
user_flows: Navigate to /property/[id] -> See property images and metadata -> Click Contact agent button -> Fill name field -> Fill email field -> Fill phone/message field -> Click Send message -> Server records lead -> See success confirmation toast -> Lead appears in agent dashboard /my-properties

Navigate to /property/[id] -> Click Contact agent -> Fill form with invalid email -> Click Send message -> See validation error on email field -> Correct email -> Click Send message -> See success confirmation

features.name: Saved Searches & Notifications
features.description: Ability for signed users to save filter sets from /search and receive notifications when new matching properties are listed; saved searches sync in real-time under /saved-searches.
user_flows: Navigate to /search -> Apply filters (neighborhood, price, bedrooms) -> Click Save search -> If guest, see sign-in prompt -> Sign in -> Confirm save search -> Navigate to /saved-searches -> See saved search listed and synced in real-time
Navigate to /search -> Apply filters -> Click Save search -> Server returns 500 error -> See error message "Could not save search" -> Retry later

features.name: Agent Property CRM (/my-properties)
features.description: Agent dashboard to manage own listings, view and track leads per property, and edit or delete listings.
user_flows: Navigate to /my-properties -> See list of own properties -> Click property item -> See leads list for property -> Click a lead -> See lead contact details -> Click Edit listing -> Update price field -> Click Save -> See updated listing in list

Navigate to /my-properties -> Click Edit listing -> Change field to invalid value -> Click Save -> See validation error -> Fix value -> Click Save -> If save conflict occurs, see 'Conflict, try again' message

features.name: Publish Listing (multi-step)
features.description: Authenticated multi-step form at /publish for agents to create a new listing, including specific local fields for Ley 18.795 and accepted guarantees.
user_flows: Navigate to /publish -> Fill step 1 basic info (title, operation) -> Click Next -> Upload images in step 2 -> Click Next -> Fill Ley 18.795 and guarantees fields in step 3 -> Click Submit -> Server creates listing -> Redirect to /my-properties -> See new listing in list

Navigate to /publish -> Fill step 1 leaving a required field empty -> Click Next -> See validation error on required field -> Fill required field -> Continue -> Upload image fails -> See upload error -> Retry upload

routes.description: Home page with featured properties and quick search
Advanced search with filters and map view
Detailed property view with contact form and map
List of saved search criteria with real-time sync
Agent dashboard for managing listed properties

features.name: Advanced Real Estate Search
features.description: Dynamic filtering system with map toggle and real-time POI
user_interactions: Toggle between List and Map view

features.name: Property CRM for Agents
features.description: Management of leads and property lifecycle

features.name: Uruguayan Market Specialization
features.description: Specific fields for Ley 18.795 (Vivienda Promovida) and local guarantees
user_interactions: View accepted rental guarantees (ANDA, Porto, etc.)

known_limitations.impact: Dynamic property URLs need manual or periodic update logic for SEO
Requires Suspense boundaries to avoid build worker crashes
